curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Patch commit 519aeef is the merge of PR #6970 into main (parent: 649e9e7). Only one non-test source file changed (internal/db/repo_editor.go), function isRepositoryGitPath. The function failed to check for paths ending in '.git.' (with trailing dot), which Windows treats identically to '.git', allowing attackers to bypass the upload restriction and place crafted git config files enabling SSH-based command execution. Sibling files in internal/db/ checked — no other files share the same path-validation pattern. Vulnerability class confirmed as command-injection per CWE-77/CWE-78 and advisory description.
